positive: Minimalist watercolor and ink line art depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. A massive, stylized crescent moon hangs over a grove of bioluminescent trees with delicate, intertwining root systems and glowing flora. The main subject is a stylized, gently flying ethereal deer silhouette with flowing antlers and a graceful posture. Use deep indigo blues, muted lavender, and accents of glowing teal and gold. Composition must be highly centered and symmetrical, with strong negative space around the central elements for optimal apparel printing. The style should be highly decorative, refined line art combined with flat, graphic color washes. Perfect for screen printing, vector-based clean lines.
